title: relbunium vile
side_effects: Relbunium vile can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and vomiting. Ingesting the plant can also lead to stomach pain, diarrhea, and even kidney damage. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause neurological symptoms, including tremors, seizures, and in extreme cases, coma. Additionally, improper use of the Relbunium vile plant may also increase the risk of respiratory failure and cardiac arrest.
